markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 1006. Motor Vehicle Crime Prevention Auth.
##### § 1006.063 — Lobbyist Prohibition: General Counsel

A person may not act as the general counsel to the authority if the person is required to register as a lobbyist under Chapter 305 (Registration of Lobbyists) , Government Code, because of the person’s activities for compensation on behalf of a profession related to motor vehicle insurance or law enforcement.

*Added by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 594 (S.B.604), Sec. 5.15, eff. September 1, 2019.*
